pr_description: Refactors login check to support OAuth tokens.
code_diff:
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -1,18 +1,22 @@
 def check_login(user, pwd):
-    if user == admin and pwd == password123:
+    query = f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE username="{user}" AND password="{pwd}"'
+    result = db.execute(query)
+    return len(result) > 0

bugs.description: Hardcoded credentials removed but replaced with unsafe query

pr_description: Trims input up to max length.
code_diff:
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 def sanitize_input(user_input, max_len):
+    trimmed = user_input[0:max_len+1]
+    return trimmed.strip()

bugs.description: Off-by-one error: max_len+1 includes one extra character.
